jsonLd.title: Junior SEO Specialist at Fire-Boltt
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Fire-Boltt! We are hiring a SEO Specialist for our Howrah team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Fire-Boltt:
Fire-Boltt is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Email Marketing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Fire-Boltt!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
